summary: Live PR inventory shard reviewed from the hydrated preflight artifact. The job explicitly says not to invent a shared canonical, and the fix artifact disables instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr. All listed open PRs are useful or maintainer-owned work that should remain open for their own review lanes; the only scoped quarantine is linked security-sensitive PR #92545.
